page: Microsoft Azure EC64as_v6 is an ECasv6-family virtual machine instance featuring 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor with an x86_64 architecture. The instance is configured with 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server type does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external network-attached storage. It is Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance persistent disks. The instance does not feature any graphics processing units, making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated graphics or GPU-based machine learning workloads.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the EC64as_v6 offers a dense memory configuration relative to its compute resources, making it a viable option for memory-intensive workloads without the overhead of local NVMe drives. The primary tradeoff is the reliance on network-attached storage for all disk operations. This virtual machine is designed for memory-optimized workloads, such as large-scale relational databases, in-memory caches, data analytics, and enterprise applications requiring substantial memory footprints.
description: Microsoft Azure EC64as_v6 is an ECasv6-family virtual machine instance configured with 64 dedicated vCPUs on an x86_64 AMD processor architecture. It features 512.0 GB of system memory, providing a high ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per vCPU, which positions it as a memory-optimized resource. The instance does not include local storage but is Premium Storage capable, relying entirely on external network-attached storage for disk operations. Additionally, it contains no graphics processing units. Managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this server type is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, including large relational databases, in-memory data stores, and data analytics applications that require significant memory capacity relative to compute resources without the need for local physical disks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC64as_v6 is an ECasv6-family virtual machine featuring 64 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 512 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD processors and high memory density for demanding enterprise database and analytical workloads.
